name: Snowflake
description: Identify the Snowflake by its dimpled white dial that resembles fresh snow, razor-sharp Zaratsu-polished hands and markers, and a blued seconds hand alongside a power-reserve indicator. It may come in variants like: the classic white Spring Drive and lightweight titanium cases.

name: Spring Drive
description: Identify a Spring Drive Grand Seiko by its perfectly smooth, gliding seconds hand that sweeps without ticking, frequently paired with a power-reserve indicator on the dial. It may come in variants like: Snowflake white and various nature-inspired textured dials.

name: Evolution 9
description: Identify the Evolution 9 by its updated case proportions with wider, flatter hands and markers for maximum legibility, and a broad bracelet. It may come in variants like: the white-birch textured dial and other seasonal dials.
